positions.name: Bremer Apartment Community Council/Event Coordinator
positions.description: Plans and organizes community gatherings, including rooftop parties and cultural showcases

positions.name: Bremer Apartment Community Council/Neighborhood Mediator
positions.description: Resolves conflicts between residents and facilitates community events

positions.name: Bremer Apartment Library/Librarian
positions.description: Maintains and curates the building’s shared library, assists with book searches

positions.name: Bremer Apartment Library/Library Assistant
positions.description: Helps with book organization, digitization, and maintains the library space

positions.name: Chez Lulu (French-American Bistro)/Bartender / Playwright
positions.description: Tends bar four nights a week at Chez Lulu, earning tips and hourly wages. Writes in the mornings. Occasionally earns small fees from staged readings or short play commissions, though these are infrequent and unreliable.

positions.name: Chez Lulu (French-American Bistro)/Head Bartender
positions.description: Oversees the bar operations, manages inventory, and trains new staff

positions.name: Chez Lulu (French-American Bistro)/Waiter
positions.description: Provides table service, takes orders, and ensures guest satisfaction

positions.name: Corner Coffee Shop/Barista Intern
positions.description: Assists with coffee preparation and learns the ropes of café operations

positions.name: Corner Coffee Shop/Full-Time Barista
positions.description: Handles coffee preparation, customer service, and daily operations of the shop

positions.name: Self-employed (contributes to The Atlantic, New York Magazine, various outlets)/Freelance journalist and novelist
positions.organization: Self-employed (contributes to The Atlantic, New York Magazine, various outlets)
positions.description: Freelance writer earning income from magazine features, copywriting for a tech firm, and occasional journalism workshops he teaches at The New School.

positions.name: The Corner Coffee Shop, Bremer Apartment/Part-time barista
positions.organization: The Corner Coffee Shop, Bremer Apartment
positions.description: Works four shifts a week at the building's corner coffee shop — opening duties, espresso bar, and register. Reliable, quiet, and surprisingly good with regulars despite his reserve.

positions.name: The Rooftop Gathering/Music Coordinator
positions.description: Organizes and schedules musical performances for rooftop events

positions.name: The Rooftop Gathering/Rooftop Host
positions.description: Manages the rooftop space for evening gatherings and ensures a welcoming atmosphere
